college_faqs.answer: KK Wagh Institute of Engineering Education and Research (KKWIEER) is a reputed engineering college in Nashik affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University.
The campus is located in Nashik city and is around 5 km from the main city area.
The institute offers B.Tech, M.Tech and Ph.D programs in various engineering disciplines.
Degrees are awarded by Savitribai Phule Pune University with the institute name mentioned.
You can check fee details here: https://engg.kkwagh.edu.in/shikshan_shulka_samiti
You can contact the college at +912532221319 or +917888045550 for admission queries.
Scholarships are available for SC/ST, OBC, EBC and other eligible students as per government rules.
Yes, the campus has a full-time doctor and ambulance facility.
The Principal of KKWIEER is Dr. K.N. Nandurkar.
The HOD of Computer Engineering is Prof. S.M. Kamlapur.
The Dean of KKWIEER is Dr. S.Y. Kute.
The library is free for students and offers a wide collection of books and study materials.
The gym is available from 6 AM to 9 AM and 3 PM to 6 PM. Sports like chess, carrom, volleyball and basketball are available.
The college provides good placement opportunities with training and support for students.
Hostel facilities are available for students with necessary amenities.
The campus has a canteen providing food and refreshments for students.
There are multiple parking areas available for students including separate areas for boys and girls.
A bank facility is available inside the campus near A-Wing exit.
IDEA Lab and workshops are available with permission for practical learning and projects.
The academic year consists of two semesters from June to April.
You can raise complaints through your class coordinator or suggestion box.
Students can sit in common rooms, benches near the ground, or in the canteen during free time.
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the simulation of human intelligence in machines that can think, learn and make decisions.
Engineering is a field that focuses on solving real-world problems using science and technology.
